steps.title: Find the intercept value
steps.content:
The $y$-intercept occurs when $x=0$.
$$y=600(4)^{2(0)}$$
$$y=600(4)^0$$
$$y=600$$
So the intercept has $x$-coordinate $0$ and $y$-value $600$.

steps.title: Interpret the starting time
steps.content: The variable $x$ counts six-month periods starting from the end of March $1993$. When $x=0$, no six-month periods have passed, so the graph describes the estimated subscribers at the end of March $1993$. The answer is B.
